LAW & MOTION/DISCOVERY, DEPT. 301, AS TO AUG-21-2025 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT NICOLE DONN'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT NICOLE DONN'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AS A JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DONN SHALL PREPARE A PROPOSED JUDGMENT AND SHARE IT WITH PLAINTIFF SIRVAN YOUNESI PURSUANT TO RULE OF COURT 3.1312. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING.) COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-01-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement
Off Calendar Aug-21-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. Bryce Armendariz, Esq. of The Law Office of Jonathan M. Kashani, P.L.C. (tel: 818-621-5274) for Plaintiff Sirvan Younesi.
Atty. Michael Welch, Esq. of Jeanette N. Little & Associates (tel: 925-225-6838) for Defendant Nicole Donn.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT NICOLE DONN's Motion To Enforce Settlement.

Matter argued and submitted. Upon conclusion, the Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Nicole Donn's motion to enforce settlement as a judgment is granted. Donn shall prepare a proposed judgment and share it with plaintiff Sirvan Younesi pursuant to Rule of Court 3.1312. (See word minutes for complete ruling.)

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

DEFENDANT NICOLE DONN'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT [ADDED FOR POSTING OF PART 2 OF 2 OF THE TENTATIVE RULING]

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement
Off Calendar Aug-05-2025 Continued To Aug-21-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT NICOLE DONN's Motion To Enforce Settlement.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The court exercises its discretion to consider plaintiff Sirvan Younesi's late-filed opposition. The court continues the motion to enforce settlement for hearing to August 21, 2025 to permit defendant to file a reply brief.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
